speaker: speaker1
text: Come on ! It's time to go !

speaker: speaker2
text: Wait a minute ! Just hold your horses ! What's your hurry , anyway ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , I've got to stop and get gas in the car , first .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , it won't if there no line at the pump .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'll give you five more minutes , then I'm going on without you !

speaker: speaker2
text: You wouldn't do a thing like that !
